title: ACES Scenario Pack — Validation (v0)
description: Validation evidence for a pack: the checks that were run and their results. Evidence is ACES-native and surfaced through ordinary checks; validation tooling itself is out of scope for this schema.

packId.description: Pack this validation record applies to.

checks.description: Validation checks run against the pack and their outcomes.

evidence.description: Non-sensitive reference to the evidence for this check.
